title: find_similar_signs data payload
description: v0.23.0 sign2vec query tool. Returns the top-K signs whose distributional-context vectors are closest in cosine to the query sign. Embeddings learned from corpus co-occurrence via PPMI + truncated SVD (Levy & Goldberg 2014 baseline; Halko–Martinsson–Tropp 2011 randomized SVD). Companion to v0.15's tablet-level Random Indexing embeddings — that axis exposes thematic similarity at composition level; this axis exposes sign-level distributional equivalence (logogram substitutions, period-specific sign equivalences, phonetic/semantic clusters). Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

query_sign.description: The sign code submitted by the caller, after whitespace trim.

query_in_corpus.description: True iff the query sign passes the min_occurrences gate and has an embedding vector in the index.

sign.description: Neighbor sign code (e.g. an ABZ identifier).

cosine.description: Cosine similarity between the query sign's embedding and this neighbor's embedding. Both vectors are L2-normalized at build time so cosine is a direct dot product.

occurrences.description: How many times this neighbor sign occurs in the cleaned corpus (X tokens excluded; corpus-exclusions list applied).

total_signs_indexed.description: Vocab size of the sign2vec index — signs occurring ≥ min_occurrences times in the corpus.

window_size.description: ±window context width used at build time (default 5 in v0.23.0).

build_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which scripts/build-sign-embeddings.mjs produced the on-disk index. Empty string when the index is unavailable.
